rationale: Unnecessary header include in libbson; pure internal C code hygiene, no spec involvement.
GridFS index creation behavior difference across MongoDB versions; no specific GridFS spec rule cited.
Build system improvement to enable code coverage; no spec involvement.
Compiler unused-variable warnings when building without OpenSSL; build quality issue.
Build convenience improvement: pass test arguments to debug runs; no spec involvement.
SASL mutex trace output captured before custom log handler set; logging/init ordering issue, not spec-related.
User support question about mongod failing to start on CentOS; not a driver issue at all.
sockettimeoutms URI option not read after SDAM merge; regression bug in URI parsing, not a spec rule violation.
SDAM spec requires replicaSet name validation; driver accepted hosts with wrong or absent setName. Verified by SDAM YAML tests.
API ergonomics request to set URI options programmatically rather than via URI string; feature request not spec violation.
Network read error causing duplicate inserts; low-level socket/stream reliability bug, no spec involvement.
Crash (use-after-free / bson_destroy on invalid pointer) in cluster disconnect; internal memory bug.
API ergonomics request for WriteResult access on update; not a spec nonconformance, just missing API surface.
Explicitly cites SDAM spec's updateRSWithPrimaryFromMember subroutine; driver fails to update topology type when primary changes setName.
SDAM spec requires safe handling of servers not in hosts list; use-after-free when primary omits itself from hosts.
CI/test infrastructure improvement to enable mock server tests on Solaris; not spec-related.
Spec requires recovering members not be selectable for reads; driver incorrectly treats recovering nodes as secondaries.
Platform-specific pthread_cond_timedwait overflow on Solaris; platform portability bug, not spec rule violation.
SDAM spec requires passive (priority=0) hosts in isMaster response to be tracked; driver discards them entirely.
Memory leaks in _mongoc_cluster_ismaster; internal resource management bug, not a spec violation.
Feature request for runtime-configurable trace logging; internal logging API enhancement, no spec involvement.
Compiler warning about undefined MONGOC_TRACE macro in #if conditional; build hygiene, no spec involvement.
Internal API exposure request so PHP driver can reuse mongoc_uri_parse_host(); driver interoperability, not spec compliance.
SDAM spec requires scanning all seeds; driver only contacts first seed in seedlist, ignoring the rest.
Internal code cleanup: consolidate Windows usleep implementations; no spec involvement.
Internal refactor to remove bare memory method usage; code hygiene, no spec involvement.
Spec says wtimeoutms applies to any replica-acknowledged write concern (w>=2, majority, tag sets); driver only sets it for 'majority'.
Static analysis finding: unsigned comparison always true in matcher; internal code correctness bug.
TLS handshake can block forever; network/timeout reliability issue, not a spec violation.
Build improvement to allow C++ compilation mode; language portability, no spec involvement.
Compiler warning about possibly uninitialized value in test; build hygiene, no spec involvement.
Explicitly cites SDAM spec requirement: single-threaded scan must continue until all discovered nodes checked; driver stops after initial set.
Integer overflow in timeout calculations due to int32_t; internal type consistency bug, not a spec rule violation.
Lost condition variable notification in topology scan request; concurrency/threading bug, no specific SDAM rule cited.
Directly cites CRUD spec AggregateOptions.batchSize field; driver does not send batchSize to server as spec requires.
Directly quotes SDAM spec: monitoring socket MUST use connectTimeoutMS; driver uses serverSelectionTimeoutMS instead.
OpenSSL memory reported as still-reachable by valgrind after mongoc_cleanup(); memory leak/tooling artifact, no spec involvement.
NULL pointer dereference (bson_destroy on NULL) after getlasterror network failure; internal crash bug, not spec-related.
Documentation improvement for invalid bson_t object behavior; docs/API clarity issue, no spec involvement.
API ergonomics: pool size parameters should be settable programmatically; feature request, not spec violation.
Driver should check maxWireVersion to decide cursor format for aggregate; unconditional retry wastes round-trips and violates wire protocol semantics.
GCC pragma diagnostic not allowed inside functions; compiler portability/build issue, no spec involvement.
Hang in large bulk upsert due to unchecked network write errors; reliability/crash bug, not a spec violation.
Unchecked errors on failed network writes; internal error handling bug, not a spec rule violation.
Rename showDiskLoc to showRecordId per server change; depends on DRIVERS-219 coordination ticket. Empty description; Improvement type with Issue split parent.
Segfault in replica set seed connection test; internal crash/memory bug in test code.
Async scan spins 30s after server hangup; polling/timeout behavior bug, no specific SDAM spec rule cited.
Crash (segfault) destroying replset client when nodes pointer is NULL after realloc; internal memory management bug.
OpenSSL context conflict when another library also uses OpenSSL; TLS initialization ordering issue, not spec-related.
Windows WSAEMSGSIZE error not detected via errno; platform-specific socket error handling bug, not spec-related.
